title: Miku Plushies
description: you can now have Hatsune Miku Plushies all over your world
body:
## Looking for volunteers on porting the mod to version 26.1/NeoForge, please [contact me on Github](https://github.com/4nyNoob) if you have the skill [//]: # ()

Hatsune Miku Just Arrived in Minecraft

[//]: # (info Badges)

[//]: # ( ) [//]: # ( ) [//]: # ( )

[//]: # (Download Links)

Craft as many shears as your heart desire and start building your collection of Vocaloids. 90+ designs from 10 different Vocaloids and still counting. You can suggest new plushies via GitHub Issues or contact me on Bluesky

## Features: - ### 100% Portuguese(Brazil) and English (US) Dubbed - ### You can put the plushies in your head (even tough they don't like the heights) - ### All Tetos *(almost)* can be crafted as a pickaxe - ### They complain when you use them as a weapon - ### Plushies can be your pets now - ### They Can Dance!!! ![Plushies dancing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/4nyNoob/miku-plushie-mod/refs/heads/fabric-1.20.1/assets/gameplay/dance.gif) - ### They Can Hunt With You ![A couple of Hatsune Mikus v4 Hunting a cow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/4nyNoob/miku-plushie-mod/refs/heads/fabric-1.20.1/assets/gameplay/hunting.gif) - ### And much More
FAQ - ### Q: Forge? - A: Use [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) alongside [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras). I'm not planning into porting the mod myself, but I'm always open to accepting and supporting porting efforts by the community. - ### Q: Can I use this on my Modpack? - A: Yes! absolutely :D
If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! https://ko-fi.com/4nynoob
